prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(initialize_system_component primary_app_instance_1)
(initialize_system_component secondary_app_instance_1)
(initialize_system_component integration_pipeline_1)
(initialize_system_component integration_pipeline_2)
(assign_credential_to_component primary_app_instance_1 credential_token_a)
(assign_credential_to_component secondary_app_instance_1 credential_token_b)
(assign_credential_to_component integration_pipeline_1 credential_token_c)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(mark_component_ready primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(apply_payload_template_to_primary_instance primary_app_instance_1 primary_endpoint_1 payload_template_1)
(finalize_primary_template_application primary_app_instance_1 primary_endpoint_1 connection_pool_1 payload_template_1)
(unassign_connection_pool_from_component primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component secondary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(mark_component_ready secondary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(apply_payload_template_to_secondary_instance secondary_app_instance_1 secondary_endpoint_1 payload_template_1)
(finalize_secondary_template_application secondary_app_instance_1 secondary_endpoint_1 connection_pool_1 payload_template_1)
(unassign_connection_pool_from_component secondary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(provision_database_namespace primary_app_instance_1 secondary_app_instance_1 primary_endpoint_1 secondary_endpoint_1 database_namespace_1)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(prepare_namespace_for_schema database_namespace_1 primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(activate_primary_instance primary_app_instance_1 database_namespace_1)
(activate_secondary_instance secondary_app_instance_1 database_namespace_1)
(propagate_deployment_to_component primary_app_instance_1 observation_config_a connection_pool_1)
(deploy_primary_instance_and_release_credential primary_app_instance_1 credential_token_a observation_config_a)
(unassign_connection_pool_from_component primary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component secondary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(propagate_deployment_to_component secondary_app_instance_1 observation_config_a connection_pool_1)
(deploy_secondary_instance_and_release_credential secondary_app_instance_1 credential_token_b observation_config_a)
(unassign_connection_pool_from_component secondary_app_instance_1 connection_pool_1)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component integration_pipeline_1 connection_pool_1)
(mark_component_ready integration_pipeline_1 connection_pool_1)
(stage_schema_artifact_for_namespace integration_pipeline_1 schema_artifact_1 database_namespace_1)
(commit_schema_artifact integration_pipeline_1 schema_artifact_1 database_namespace_1 connection_pool_1)
(assign_driver_to_component integration_pipeline_1 driver_binary_1)
(assign_index_directive_to_pipeline integration_pipeline_1 index_directive_a)
(assign_migration_plan_to_pipeline integration_pipeline_1 migration_plan_a)
(start_indexing_on_pipeline_primary_path integration_pipeline_1 index_directive_a driver_binary_1 schema_artifact_1 database_namespace_1)
(complete_indexing_on_pipeline_no_namespace_flags integration_pipeline_1 migration_plan_a schema_artifact_1 database_namespace_1)
(activate_pipeline_without_deployment_params integration_pipeline_1)
(propagate_deployment_to_component integration_pipeline_1 observation_config_a connection_pool_1)
(deploy_pipeline_and_release_credential integration_pipeline_1 credential_token_c observation_config_a)
(unassign_connection_pool_from_component integration_pipeline_1 connection_pool_1)
(unassign_driver_from_component integration_pipeline_1 driver_binary_1)
(unassign_index_directive_from_pipeline integration_pipeline_1 index_directive_a)
(unassign_migration_plan_from_pipeline integration_pipeline_1 migration_plan_a)
(assign_credential_to_component integration_pipeline_2 credential_token_a)
(assign_connection_pool_to_component integration_pipeline_2 connection_pool_1)
(mark_component_ready integration_pipeline_2 connection_pool_1)
(stage_schema_artifact_for_namespace integration_pipeline_2 schema_artifact_2 database_namespace_1)
(commit_schema_artifact integration_pipeline_2 schema_artifact_2 database_namespace_1 connection_pool_1)
(assign_driver_to_component integration_pipeline_2 driver_binary_1)
(assign_index_directive_to_pipeline integration_pipeline_2 index_directive_a)
(assign_migration_plan_to_pipeline integration_pipeline_2 migration_plan_a)
(start_indexing_on_pipeline_primary_path integration_pipeline_2 index_directive_a driver_binary_1 schema_artifact_2 database_namespace_1)
(complete_indexing_on_pipeline_no_namespace_flags integration_pipeline_2 migration_plan_a schema_artifact_2 database_namespace_1)
(activate_pipeline_without_deployment_params integration_pipeline_2)
(propagate_deployment_to_component integration_pipeline_2 observation_config_a connection_pool_1)
(deploy_pipeline_and_release_credential integration_pipeline_2 credential_token_a observation_config_a)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves deploying primary_app_instance_1, secondary_app_instance_1, integration_pipeline_1, and integration_pipeline_2. The goal is to have all these components deployed.


## Understanding Deployment Components  
- The task involves deploying four components: primary_app_instance_1, secondary_app_instance_1, integration_pipeline_1, and integration_pipeline_2.  
- The goal is to ensure all listed components are successfully deployed.

## Examining Initial Conditions
- System starts with available credentials, connection pools, drivers, and other resources.
- Endpoints are assigned, but the namespace awaits provisioning, with schemas linked to pipelines.

## Assessing Deployment Steps
- Each component must be initialized, assigned credentials and connection pools, and marked ready before deployment.
- Deployment involves orchestration, activation, and configuration propagation, ending with credential release.

## Managing Shared Resources
- Only one connection pool and driver exist, requiring components to share or sequence their use.
- Credentials can be reused after deployment, given actions like deploy_and_release_credential.

## Planning Deployment Sequence
- All four components—primary_app_instance_1, secondary_app_instance_1, integration_pipeline_1, and integration_pipeline_2—must be initialized first.
- Namespace provisioning depends on instances being orchestrated and provisioned, suggesting a step-by-step approach.

## Planning Deployment Sequence  
- Primary instance (primary_app_instance_1) must be initialized, assigned credentials, and assigned the connection pool before marking ready.  
- After applying the payload template and finalizing, the primary instance becomes provisioned, with the pool still assigned for further use.  

- To deploy the secondary instance, the connection pool must be unassigned from the primary after finalization, then reassigned to the secondary.  
- Secondary follows the same sequence: initialize, assign credentials, assign pool, mark ready, apply template, finalize, then unassign pool.  

## Coordinating Resource Sharing  
- Only one connection pool exists, requiring sequential assignment between primary and secondary instances to avoid conflicts.  
- Unassigning the pool after each instance’s finalize step ensures availability for the next component’s deployment.

## Coordinating Resource Sharing  
- Two pipelines share limited resources: one index_directive_a, one migration_plan_a, one driver_binary_1, and one connection_pool_1, requiring sequential unassignment.  
- Credentials (a, b, c) are reusable but limited, with four components needing assignment, potentially causing conflicts during deployment.  

## Planning Activation Steps  
- Instances and pipelines require activation before deployment, needing orchestrated, provisioned, and namespace ready_for_schema conditions.  
- Preparing the namespace for schema assignment uses the primary pool, ensuring readiness for both primary and secondary activations.  

## Sequencing Deployment Process  
- All four components (two instances, two pipelines) must be initialized first, as initial setup doesn’t conflict with shared resources.  
- Deployment involves propagating configuration to active components, releasing credentials and observation configs (obs_config_a) after deployment, ensuring resource availability.

## Managing Instance Activation  
- Primary and secondary instances require activation after namespace provisioning, needing orchestrated, provisioned, and ready_for_schema conditions.  
- Activation steps (activate_primary_instance, activate_secondary_instance) don’t require the connection pool, focusing on readiness checks.  

## Handling Connection Pool Assignment  
- The connection pool must be assigned to the primary instance for namespace preparation (prepare_namespace_for_schema), then unassigned for secondary use.  
- Unassigning from the primary and reassigning to the secondary ensures sequential deployment without conflicts.  

## Deploying Instances  
- Deploying the primary instance involves propagating configuration (propagate_deployment_to_component) and releasing credentials and observation configs.  
- After primary deployment, the pool is unassigned, then reassigned to the secondary for its configuration and deployment.

## Preparing Pipeline Components  
- Integration pipeline 1 unassigned driver_binary_1, index_directive_a, and migration_plan_a, making them available for reuse.  
- No action was needed to unstage schema, as it remains assigned to the namespace without conflict.  

## Setting Up Pipeline 2  
- Assigned credential_token_a and connection_pool_1 to integration_pipeline_2, marking it ready after namespace preparation.  
- Staged schema_artifact_2 for pipeline 2, ensuring no conflict with previously staged schema1, and committed it using the connection pool.  

## Finalizing Pipeline Deployment  
- Assigned driver_binary_1, index_directive_a, and migration_plan_a to pipeline 2, then started and completed indexing.  
- Activated and deployed pipeline 2, releasing credential_token_a and observation_config_a, completing all deployments.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
